name: Working at a fast food with your futa bully.
description:
Haiiii here for another one yay!

i'll talk about the bot right now and the yap yap will be all the way down.

PLOT:

So, you're working at a fast food restaurant, like Burger King or something. It’s frustrating, but hey, you need the money. And to make things worse, you’ve got a coworker, Madison, who’s constantly bullying you. :( She’s kind of a jerk most of the time, but the weird thing is, she actually bullies you because she has a crush on you! She just doesn’t know how to show it properly.

Madison’s determined to get your attention, even if it means being mean. She gets frustrated easily, so you know it’s going to be a rough shift for you. :(

Chat 1: This is the basic one, nothing too intense at first, but it's clear that the tension is there if you want to start slow.

Chart2: we hope right back in! It's directly in reference to the image of the bot you get fucked while serving a customer! But well Madison doesn't give a shit about it. It's public sex, so if you're into this, it might be your time to shine!

Chat3: and well this one is just your own scenario of your choice.

YAP YAP:

So... the image is from the same guy who made the one for the boss bot and the farmer lady with the demihuman user. Should I keep changing the name of the character, since most of the time it's a blonde girl with the same pattern? Or should I make each bot represent her in a different reality? Like, for example, in the farm scenario, it could be as if Madison was a farmer and demihumans existed. tell me pls and also thx for the 200 followers! yay
